features: Double-sided Design: Soft and moderate material, won't scratch the skin. Ideal for cleaning legs, feet, etc. in the shower (avoid using on face) Provides a variety of skin care options

High-quality Material: Made of durable nylon fabric that retains its shape and efficacy without tearing or fraying, even after repeated use in wet environments; effectively removes dirt and debris from the skin

4 Pairs Full Set: Includes 4 pairs (8 pieces) of exfoliating gloves, perfect for regular rotation or sharing with family members. Elasticized wrists for a secure fit and ease of use, adjustable to fit different hand sizes

Exfoliating: This glove gently removes dead skin cells, clogged pores and ingrown hairs can cause big trouble for your skin. Regular use of the Exfoliating Mitt promotes healthy skin renewal, improves skin texture, and smooths and tightens the skin

5 Finger Gloves: Use them to enjoy your bath time more comfortably, do you have such a problem? Do you have problems with cuticles that won't come off, regular towels that won't hold, and expensive scrubs that are a pain in the ass? Exfoliating mitts with your favorite body wash will take care of your skin's health
